label: Spectre Proxy: Open Dashboard
description: Open the Spectre Proxy dashboard in the browser

label: Spectre Proxy: Chat (Quick Message)
command: curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8082/v1/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-api-key: spectre-proxy" -d '{"model":"","messages":[{"role":"user","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Say hello briefly"}]}],"max_tokens":256,"stream":false}' | python3 -m json.tool
description: Send a quick test message to the Spectre Proxy

label: Spectre Proxy: Start Proxy (Built Binary)
description: Start the Spectre proxy from built binary

label: Spectre Proxy: Restart Proxy
command: pkill -f spectre-server 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; cd ~/Spectre\ CC/spectre-proxy/agent && go run ./cmd/spectre-server/ &

label: Spectre Proxy: Open Terminal
description: Open terminal in the spectre-proxy directory

label: Spectre Proxy: Open Settings
description: Open the Spectre Proxy settings/tools page

label: Spectre Proxy: Build Proxy
description: Build the Spectre proxy binary from source

label: Spectre Proxy: View Logs
command: tail -f ~/Spectre\ CC/spectre-proxy/agent/logs/*.log 2>/dev/null || echo 'No log files found'

label: Spectre Proxy: Open Memory Graph
description: Open the memory graph in the browser

label: Spectre Proxy: Open Task Board
description: Open the task board in the browser
